description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, terracotta-tiled gable roof and solid brick walls, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. The brickwork is uniform and reddish-brown, with a clear texture that suggests durability and classic construction. Only one side of the house displays a visible entry door, which is simple, rectangular, and white, standing out against the brick facade. The roof extends symmetrically on both sides, with no visible overhangs or decorative trim. There are no visible windows or additional architectural embellishments, resulting in a minimalist and utilitarian design. The overall structure is compact, with a single story and a prominent triangular roof profile.
description: A compact brick house with a steep terracotta gable roof and a single white entry door, featuring a minimalist, windowless design.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain brick wall topped by the steep terracotta gable roof, with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_1: This view reveals the front of the house, featuring a white entry door centered on the brick wall beneath the gable roof.
description_view_2: This side view displays another plain brick wall with the gable roof above, similar to view 0 and without any openings.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the house, again with a plain brick wall and the steep roof, mirroring view 2.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple centered white door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements
